posts.author: danc (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

After typing the name of an item, it would be helpful to have an option to directly enter into a sub-item, similar to how shift+enter currently creates another item

What are you trying to achieve

Being able to create a sub-item without having to click into it separately to improve efficiency
